title: Scalable multi-modal feature fusion for large-scale recommendation systems
inventors: A. Mittal, K. Dahiya, M. Varma
abstract: A system and method for efficiently fusing heterogeneous feature modalities in large-scale recommendation pipelines, enabling real-time inference across billions of items with sub-linear computational complexity.
citation: Mittal, A., Dahiya, K., & Varma, M. (2025). Scalable multi-modal feature fusion for large-scale recommendation systems. U.S. Patent Application No. US-2025-XXXXXX.

title: Adaptive tokenization framework for multilingual query understanding
inventors: A. Mittal, J. Ajmera, S. Kuruvilla
abstract: A method for dynamically adapting tokenization strategies based on query language and domain context, improving relevance in multilingual search and advertising systems.
citation: Mittal, A., Ajmera, J., & Kuruvilla, S. (2024). Adaptive tokenization framework for multilingual query understanding. U.S. Patent Application No. US-2024-YYYYYY.
